name: Shayan Rabbi
description: A clean publishing system for projects, essays, and working notes by Shayan Rabbi.
heroIntro: I build and write around venture, digital infrastructure, and products that need a sharper point of view. This site keeps the work legible without the usual feed-shaped clutter.
heroPanel: Former heart surgeon. Now focused on venture, digital infrastructure, and product thinking with a strong bias against avoidable complexity.
focusAreas: Writing that explains the work without flattening it

principles.title: Signal over spectacle
principles.description: If a page needs theatre to stay interesting, the thinking usually is not finished.

principles.title: Structure should stay visible
principles.description: The files, the output, and the deploy path should all be easy to inspect without framework archaeology.

principles.title: Small systems compound
principles.description: Short paths, explicit content, and a tiny build surface make publishing easier to sustain.

footerNote: Generated with npm, JSON, HTML, and CSS.
